creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Renato Botelho from comment #18)
> (In reply to Glen Barber from comment #16)
> We are using this patch for some time in pfSense, and a user reported the
> same issue today.

Once Gleb returns from being "away", we'll address this in 10.x, hopefully for inclusion in 10.2-RELEASE.
